title: SkyQuill
description: A hypixel skyblock mod that adds features that other mods miss.
body:
# SkyQuill

Have any questions or suggestions? Join our discord [here](https://discord.gg/4YV6d4h8xW)

SkyQuill is a Minecraft Forge 1.8.9 mod for Hypixel SkyBlock, designed to provide unique quality-of-life features and protect players from common scams.

---

## ✨ Features

- **Dungeon Alerts:** Get notified when the Blood Room is cleared and other helpful alerts.
- **Mining:** Track the ammount of powder chests you have found while powder mining with an in-game counter.
- **Scam Prevention:** Blocks the infamous Overflux Capacitor scam and more scam protections coming soon!
- **Actively Developed:** New features and improvements are always being added.

> _SkyQuill is made with care by SkyBlock players, for SkyBlock players!_

---

## 📥 Installation

1. **Install Forge 1.8.9:**  
   [Download Forge 1.8.9](https://files.minecraftforge.net/maven/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.8.9.html)

2. **Get SkyQuill:**  
   - [Download from Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/project/skyquill)
   - [Download from GitHub Releases](https://github.com/vaclavak/SkyQuill/releases)

3. **Install:**  
   - Place the `SkyQuill-x.x.x.jar` file into your `.minecraft/mods` folder.
   - Start Minecraft using the Forge 1.8.9 profile.

---

## ⚙️ Usage

- Open the SkyQuill settings in-game with the default Right Shift key.
- Toggle and explore features to enhance your Hypixel SkyBlock experience!
- For list of commands, visit the github page [here](https://github.com/vaclavak/SkyQuill)

---

## 💻 Commands

SkyQuill provides several in-game commands to help you manage features and monitor your progress:

- **`/sq chestcounter check`** – Shows the current powder chest counter.
- **`/sq chestcounter reset`** – Resets the powder chest counter.
- **`/sq commissioncounter check`** – Shows the current commission counter.
- **`/sq commissioncounter reset`** – Resets the commission counter.
- **`/sq counters`** – Shows the status of all counters.
- **`/sq help`** – Lists all available SkyQuill subcommands.
- **`/sq devversion`** or **`/sq dev`** – Shows the developer version information.
- **`/sq fullversion`** – Shows full version info.

> **Note:** You can also use `/skyquill`, `/skyq`, or `/squill` as command aliases instead of `/sq`.

For the latest commands and updates, visit the [SkyQuill GitHub page](https://github.com/vaclavak/SkyQuill).

## 🛡️ Compliance & Safety

SkyQuill is carefully designed to follow Hypixel's allowed modifications rules.  
No macros, auto-clickers, or unfair advantages—ever.

> **Always use mods at your own risk.**  
> See [Hypixel’s allowed mods guide](https://hypixel.net/threads/guide-allowed-modifications.345453/).

---

## 🧑‍💻 Contributing

Contributions are welcome!
